# <div>Keep up the excellent work, and you'll become a proficient academic writer 

## Context
From document: Week 1 | Overview — chunk 71 (chunk 71/75)

## Content
<div>Keep up the excellent work, and you'll become a proficient academic writer by mastering the writing process and making informed writing decisions!</div>
